nasb.text: The angel of the Lord came again a second time and touched him and said, “Arise, eat, because the journey is too great for you.”

esv.text: And the angel of the Lord came again a second time and touched him and said, “Arise and eat, for the journey is too great for you.”

cnv.text: 耶和華的使者第二次回來拍他，說：“起來吃吧！因為你要走的路程太遠了。”

ccb.text: 耶和华的天使第二次来拍醒他，说：“起来吃东西吧，你还要走很远的路。”
